   × should clear cookie on logout 87ms
     → expected 'refresh_token=abc123' to be undefined
   ✓ should refresh token 18ms
   × should handle expired refresh token 56ms
     → Expected: "Token refreshed"
     Received: "Error: Token expired"
   ✓ should revoke all sessions 12ms
   ✓ should validate session expiry 14ms
   ✓ should handle concurrent sessions 10ms

   ✓ should connect to database 22ms
   ✓ should execute query 31ms
   × should timeout on slow query 102ms
     → AssertionError: expected promise to reject with TimeoutError
   ✓ should close connection 14ms
   ✓ should reconnect after failure 12ms
   ✓ should handle connection pool exhaustion 8ms

     43| export function logout(): void {
     44|   clearCookie('refresh_token')
     45|   expect(getCookie('refresh_token')).toBeUndefined()
       |                                      ^
     46| }
 ❯ src/auth/__tests__/session.test.ts:34:5

 ❯ src/auth/session.ts:78:11
     76|   } catch (err) {
     77|     // Should refresh automatically
     78|     throw new Error('Token expired')
       |           ^
     79|   }
 ❯ src/auth/__tests__/session.test.ts:56:3

 ❯ src/db/connection.ts:112:20
     110|   const result = await db.query('SELECT pg_sleep(10)')
     111|   // Expected: promise rejects with TimeoutError
     112|   expect(result).toThrow(TimeoutError)
       |                    ^
     113| }
